challenge.title: Korak 4
challenge.description: Sada koristite niz znakova šablona ili spajanje niza znakova da biste napisali poruku fccSentence.includes("freeCodeCamp") returns <hasFreeCodeCamp> because the word "freeCodeCamp" is in the sentence. na konzoli. Zamenite <hasFreeCodeCamp> sa stvarnom vrednošću parametra.

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: Treba da napišete poruku fccSentence.includes("freeCodeCamp") returns <hasFreeCodeCamp> because the word "freeCodeCamp" is in the sentence., gde <hasFreeCodeCamp> treba zameniti stvarnom vrednošću parametra.
tests.testString: assert.deepInclude(spy.calls, ['fccSentence.includes("freeCodeCamp") returns true because the word "freeCodeCamp" is in the sentence.']);

challengeFiles.name: script
